case_title: AURELIO LIOI et al VS. LAWRENCE FRELOT et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-03-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-16-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIOI, AURELIO CAHN, MURIEL AS TO DEFENDANT FRELOT, LAWRENCE DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-05-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-02-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-10-2014
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-03-2014 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-05-2014 CONTINUED TO APR-16-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-03-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
